overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a neon-lit urban alleyway at night. The scene features wet streets reflecting cyan and magenta neon lights, food stalls, vending machines, and futuristic architecture. The player follows an NPC through narrow passages and open courtyards in a dense cyberpunk city environment.

industrial metal racks with various items stored

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a food stall counter in a narrow cyberpunk alley bathed in neon light. A muscular NPC in a teal tank top stands at the counter before walking away, prompting the camera to follow. The environment features wet concrete floors reflecting the colorful neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered alley with vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alley following the departing NPC

notable_agents.action: NPC in teal tank top walking ahead in the distance

industrial metal framework and support beams overhead
circular neon sign with colorful rings

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow covered alleyway with industrial metal scaffolding overhead. A prominent pink vending machine stands on the right while neon signs glow in the background. The player follows the NPC deeper into the cyberpunk alley system.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall with steaming display counter

agents.ego_description: approaching the food stall and pausing to observe the vendor working

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a food stall where steam rises from cooking equipment behind a glass display case. A vendor in a green shirt works behind the counter. The camera pauses briefly to observe the food preparation area before moving past.

events.description: exits narrow alley into open courtyard with tall building visible ahead
camera turns right toward narrow passage with laundromat

agents.ego_description: moving through the open courtyard and scanning the area before turning

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious courtyard with a towering glass building visible in the background. Overhead walkways connect the surrounding structures. The camera pans across the open area before turning right toward a narrow passage featuring a laundromat entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage with laundromat and industrial pipes

agents.ego_description: walking past the laundromat with glowing signage toward the passage end

notable_agents.action: NPC in green shirt standing near the end of the narrow passage

entered.detail: illuminated sign with 'RIN' in blue neon letters above washing machines
industrial laundry machines visible through the laundromat window
large metal ventilation pipes running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow passage featuring a laundromat with a glowing 'RIN' neon sign and visible washing machines. Industrial pipes run overhead along the ceiling. The player walks toward an NPC standing at the far end of the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dense cyberpunk alleyway that gradually opens into a wide courtyard before narrowing again into an industrial corridor. It begins at a neon-lit food stall where the camera follows a muscular NPC across wet concrete floors that reflect vibrant cyan and magenta hues. As the camera moves deeper into the alley system, it passes under industrial metal scaffolding and a glowing pink vending machine before pausing briefly at another food stall where steam rises from a glass display case. The scene then expands into a spacious courtyard dominated by a towering glass building and overhead walkways, before turning right toward a tighter passage. Finally, the camera glides past a laundromat marked by a glowing RIN sign and overhead pipes, moving toward an NPC waiting at the far end of the corridor.
